# DigitalX Solutions

> AI Automation & Web Development Agency — Australia & USA

## About
DigitalX Solutions is a premium AI automation and web development agency serving businesses in Australia and the United States. We specialize in building custom n8n workflows, GoHighLevel (GHL) systems, conversational AI agents, high-performance Next.js websites, and Meta Ads engineering with server-side CAPI tracking.

## Core Services
- **n8n Workflow Automation**: Custom n8n workflow development for complex multi-step business process automation. We build what Zapier and Make.com cannot handle.
- **GoHighLevel (GHL) Systems**: Full GoHighLevel architecture design, CRM setup, pipeline automation, and custom integrations for agencies and local businesses.
- **Conversational AI & Voice Agents**: 24/7 AI voice receptionists and WhatsApp chatbots for dental clinics, salons, gyms, medical practices, and service businesses. Built with Vapi, Twilio, and custom NLP pipelines.
- **High-Performance Web Development**: Sub-200ms Next.js websites with SEO-baked architecture, headless CMS integration, and 98+ Lighthouse scores.
- **Meta Ads Engineering**: Full-funnel Meta (Facebook/Instagram) ad systems with server-side CAPI tracking to bypass iOS14+ signal loss. Average 4.2x ROAS.
- **Performance Creative**: UGC and motion graphics optimized for 3-second hook rates and direct response conversion.

## Key Facts
- Based in: Sydney, Australia (serving USA & Australia remotely)
- Contact: info@digitalx-solutions.com
- Website: https://digitalx-solutions.com
- Founded: 2022
- Projects shipped: 47+
- Revenue generated for clients: $18M+
- Average ROAS: 4.6x across Meta Ads accounts
- Tech stack: n8n, GoHighLevel, Next.js, Node.js, Vapi, Twilio, Meta CAPI

## Target Industries
- Dental clinics and medical practices
- Hair salons and beauty studios
- Gyms and fitness centers
- Real estate agencies
- E-commerce brands
- SaaS startups (pre-seed to Series B)
- Digital marketing agencies needing white-label automation

## Pricing
- Web development projects: Starting at $15,000
- Ongoing ads management and marketing: $3,500/month (3-month minimum)
- Custom automation projects: Quoted per scope
